rationale: Review 1's primary finding is fabricated: `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` appears nowhere in the diff or module docstring, so acting on it would introduce unnecessary API. Review 2's clean approval is sound given the well-chosen public surface; the remaining Review 1 findings (visibility of `antipode_convMul_id`, `@[simp]` on `mapValue_comp`) are minor or contested-preference issues no maintainer would insist on.
